chapter_title: Funding Allocation and Annual Budget Cycle
snippet: The SRP framework is based on funding allocations and the annual budget cycle. Funds allocated in each component are nominated as either credit, for salaries paid on eduPay, or cash for expenses incurred locally. Schools can interchange funding between credit and cash. Funds are allocated against the components of the SRP: The funds allocated in each component are nominated as either: Schools can interchange funding between credit and cash.
